title: Auto Smelt Pickaxe
description: This is a mod that gives you an auto-smelting pickaxe. Every time you mine, the ore is automatically smelted and placed into your inventory.
body:
This is a mod that gives you an auto-smelting pickaxe. Every time you mine, the ore is automatically smelted and placed into your inventory.



**Features**

- A new pickaxe that automatically smelts your ore.
- A new separate creative tab
